sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84283" key="poikilo/qronos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποικῐλό-θρονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on richly-worked throne,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀφροδίτα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ποικιλόφρον᾽</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
